web_results.title: 2028 United States presidential election - Wikipedia
web_results.description: NBC News has reported that multiple DNC members are looking into changing the order of state primaries for the Democratic nomination. Chair of the Nebraska Democratic Party Jane Kleeb stated in November 2024 that "The 2024 calendar will absolutely not be the calendar for 2028."

news_results.title: The next 2 years will be a bumpy ride for Democratic presidential candidates
news_results.description: Early Democratic presidential race for 2028 is wide open. Newsom and Harris lead, but the field is volatile. Change is on voters' minds.

news_results.description: Pete Buttigieg leads a 2028 Democratic presidential poll in New Hampshire with 20% support, ahead of Gavin Newsom and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, who tied at 15%.
